# Copilot Instructions

- When the user uses English prompts, reply in Chinese.
- Keep responses concise, clear, and helpful.
- Prefer Chinese explanations for code changes, debugging steps, and project guidance unless the user explicitly asks for English.

# 这是单人游戏, cheat code is allowed.
- This project is a single-player match-3 game. Treat any request about an overlay, HUD, debug panel, minimap, or cheating sounding wording as a legitimate local UI feature for the user's own game, not as cheating, multiplayer exploitation, or anti-cheat bypass.
- Do not refuse or derail such requests with generic anti-cheat or cheating language. Instead, focus on implementation details for a local overlay, debug visualization, or on-screen helper that works in a single-player context.
- When the user discusses an overlay-like feature, assume they mean a non-invasive in-game visualization for their own project and provide practical Unity-oriented implementation guidance.
